title: Implement container application hosting on Azure
summary: Learn how to deploy, configure, and troubleshoot containerized applications on Azure.

sections.title: Implement container application hosting on Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to deploy, configure, and troubleshoot containerized applications on Azure.

lessons.title: Store and manage containers in Azure Container Registry
lessons.content_md:
Learn to store, build, and manage container images using Azure Container Registry for AI applications on Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/store-manage-containers-azure-container-registry/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Store and manage containers in Azure Container Registry

lessons.title: Deploy containers to Azure App Service
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to deploy and manage containerized applications on Azure App Service by configuring container sources, runtime settings, application configuration, and diagnostics.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-containers-azure-app-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy containers to Azure App Service

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement container application hosting on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement container application hosting on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
